report.summary: Cycle-close: 2 new learn guides shipped (Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols + Fully Onchain Gaming/Autonomous Worlds). Published slugs now 515 (496 unique). Git locks Day 10 — 795 uncommitted files. 46 TS errors unchanged. All 6 API routes healthy, 0/6 rate-limited.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 2 new pages built this cycle: /learn/cross-chain-messaging-protocols-guide-2026 and /learn/fully-onchain-gaming-autonomous-worlds-guide-2026 — both page.tsx files confirmed present
Both new pages have valid metadata exports (title, description, keywords, openGraph, twitter card), structured data (JSON-LD article + FAQ schemas), breadcrumbs, and BackToTop components
No 'use client' directive conflicts — both pages are server components with proper metadata exports
Published slugs in file: 515 entries (496 unique after deduplication) — up from 513/494 in previous cycle
Page audit: 103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — unchanged from previous cycle (Day 1 pillars: learn fundamentals, wallets, taxes, investing, /compare/exchanges)
TypeScript: 46 errors across 3 files — UNCHANGED (crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026, crypto-index-funds-guide-2026, structured-data.examples.ts) — all JSX escaping issues
No new regressions introduced this cycle
PUBLISH_QUEUE remains at 0 items — all queued content promoted

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s/swr:120s), trending (300s/swr:600s), fear-greed (600s/swr:1200s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s/swr:600s), defi-yields (300s dynamic)
All routes have stale-while-revalidate headers and in-memory fallback caching for API failures
Rate limiter: 0/6 core API routes using checkRateLimit — rate-limiter.ts exists but not wired (carry-over P1)
CoinGecko free tier (no API key) — rate limit risk on traffic spikes remains unmitigated
No code changes to API routes this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: Git lock files persist: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — DAY 10 of blocker
795 uncommitted files (up from 791 in previous cycle — 4 new files from this build cycle: 2 page.tsx + published-pages.ts update)
48 files changed vs last commit (e999560, Mar 17) with 4,377 insertions / 3,464 deletions
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17 16:19) — deploy gap now ~170+ pages, 8 days old
All new content since Mar 17 is LOCAL-ONLY — not reachable in production
next.config.ts has ignoreBuildErrors: true — Vercel builds will succeed despite 46 TS errors
CRITICAL: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides (Cross-Chain Messaging Protocols 2026 + Fully Onchain Gaming & Autonomous Worlds 2026), 2 slugs added to published-pages.ts
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Remains at 0 (drained). Content pipeline needs refill for next cycle.
TODAY'S TOTAL REPORTS: standup×3, build×3, community×3, design×3, publish×3, eod×3 = 18 reports
CARRY-OVER [P0]: Git locks Day 10 — 795 files, ~170+ page deploy gap. Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx (Day 1 pillars: wallets, taxes, investing, learn fundamentals, /compare/exchanges)
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 46 TS errors across 3 files — JSX escaping issues (trivial fix but not prioritized)
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes
CARRY-OVER [P2]: Duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts (515 entries but only 496 unique)
NEXT CYCLE: Refill PUBLISH_QUEUE, scaffold missing Day 1 pillar pages, Tax-Loss Harvesting tool (April 15 deadline — 21 days away)
